chapter_title.ar: باب بَيْعِ الزَّرْعِ الْأَخْضَرِ وَ الْقَصِيلِ وَ أَشْبَاهِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 133 – Selling the green plants, and the straw, and such like

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/362)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/362)

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) نَحْوَهُ

text: هِ فَإِنْ فَعَلَ فَإِنَّ عَلَيْهِ طَسْقَهُ وَ نَفَقَتَهُ وَ لَهُ مَا خَرَجَ مِنْهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Abu Ayoub, from Sama’at,

from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> similar to it, and there is an increase in it, ‘(He<sup>asws</sup> said): ‘So if he were to do it, upon him would be its maintenance and its expenditure, and for him would be whatever comes out from it’.
en.sarwar: 7. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Mahbub from abu Ayyub from Sama‘ah who has said the following: “Sama‘ah has narrated a similar Hadith from abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, with this addition, ‘If he leaves it until ears appear, he is responsible for its maintenance and expenses and he can have whatever comes out thereof.”’
